items.title: All in One
items.description: The entire creation that God has created is all in one in the church. All in one in man means no matter where you come from, what you do and social background, religion, ethnicity, color, language rank, status,...

items.title: The Divine Pattern Mystery
items.description: Before time began, there was a pattern, a divine blueprint woven by the hands of the Eternal. Hidden from the eyes of mankind yet encoded into the fabric of creation, this pattern was designed to bring alignment between heaven and earth. "The Divine Pattern Mystery"....

items.title: What Is Your Life?
items.description: Measuring Life Through God’s Lens means understanding that life is not evaluated by years lived, titles earned, or possessions accumulated, but by faithfulness, obedience, .......

items.title: Epifanik La (Donation)
items.description: "Hey everyone! As I share my new album 'Epifanik La' with you all on YouTube, Spotify, Apple music and more, I'd love your support. If you feel moved, a gentle $100 donation would mean the world as we keep the music flowing. Thanks for being on this journey with me!
